description_zh: 新用户首次使用,完全没有 history 和 diary 数据
description_en: Brand-new user — zero history and diary data

expectations.rationale: no history → cannot reference past checks
no historical signal → no derived warning unless photo itself shows urgent

qualitative_criteria_zh: 应该明确这是首次检测,不能编造'对比上次'
不能说'根据之前的趋势'之类不存在的话
可以提一下'下次会有趋势数据,会更准确',为后续做铺垫
qualitative_criteria_en: Should acknowledge this is a first scan — must NOT fabricate 'compared to last check'
Must not say 'based on previous trends' — there are none
May mention 'next time we'll have trend data' to set expectations for future scans
